text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: We finally did it, we finally, finally did it! The big day is hereee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're finally ready to debut, and Tamamo Cross's
excitement is palpable.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I might be kinda pint-sized, but up against a
buncha junior racers? The win's mine!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Cause when it comes to willpower, I'm next level!
Line 'em up so I can knock 'em down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even looking at the situation from a trainer's
perspective, I can't see anyone here giving her
trouble...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Okey doke, I'll see ya after the race!
choice_data_list: Hold on a minute. What's this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a tiny, empty lunch box sitting on the
table. Tamamo Cross must have eaten whatever
was inside.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What? That's just my lunch box.
choice_data_list: It's so small... Did you get enough to eat?
It's so small... Did you get enough to eat?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...C-c'mon, I don't need to go stuffin' myself silly
before the big race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
If I eat too much, it'll mess with my circulation. A
few bites is plenty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross looks a little flustered as she
heads off to race.
